reviews.comment:
Todo muy bien, dadas las circunstancias. Aunque hay que tener cuidado con una de las cajeras, te puede atropellar con su mala onda. Comprobado en 8 oportunidades.
Update: volaron a la cajera, hoy todo liso.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was fine, all things considered. Although you have to be careful with one of the cashiers; she's incredibly rude. I've seen it eight times.

Update: The cashier was fired; today everything was smooth.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13620060253610399834/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwdHRybHp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Como muchas estaciones de ACA ha quedado mal ubicada para el viajero de paso, volviendo de Santa Cruz cargamos combustible. Los baños clausurados.

(Translated by Google)
Like many ACA stations, it's inconveniently located for travelers passing through. We refueled on our way back from Santa Cruz. The restrooms were closed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13620060253610399834/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXNjVuMEtnEAE
